product_overview: LearnLite is a small full‑stack online education platform that lets students register, browse courses with embedded YouTube lessons, comment on sections, and lets an admin manage courses and moderate comments. It is built for demos and local development using Next.js and SQLite.
core_goals: Allow new students to create an account and sign in
Allow students to sign in, view a personalized dashboard, browse courses, watch lesson videos, and post comments
Provide a public catalog of courses with sectioned lessons, resources, and comments visible without logging in
Enable an admin to create, edit, and remove courses, sections, and resources
Enable an admin to view, reply to, and delete student comments

features.name: Student Registration
features.description: New students can create an account and are signed in automatically on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Create account -> Redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Leave required field empty or provide invalid input -> Click Create account -> See validation error for missing or invalid fields

features.name: Login and Logout
features.description: Students and admin can sign in and sign out; successful login redirects users to the role-appropriate dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Log in -> Redirect to /dashboard (student) or /admin (admin)
Navigate to /login -> Leave email or password empty -> Click Log in -> See validation error for missing or invalid fields
Be signed in -> Click Logout -> Be redirected to public entry (site shows non-authenticated views)

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Signed-in students see their dashboard summarizing available courses and their comment count.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Log in -> Redirect to /dashboard
On /dashboard -> See list of available courses and student's comment count -> Select a course card to open its detail view

features.name: Public Course Browsing
features.description: Visitors can browse the public course catalog, open course detail views, watch embedded lesson videos, and view resources and comments without logging in.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> View course cards -> Select a course card -> See course detail with sections, embedded lesson video, resources, and comments
Navigate to /courses -> Select a course card -> Click section buttons to switch video -> See the selected section's embedded video and section content

features.name: Student Commenting
features.description: Logged-in students can add comments to a course section and see admin replies in the discussion.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Log in -> Redirect to /dashboard -> Navigate to /courses -> Select a course card -> Type comment content -> Click Add comment -> See the new comment in the discussion

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Log in -> Redirect to /dashboard -> Navigate to /courses -> Select a course card -> Leave comment content empty -> Click Add comment -> See validation error for empty comment

features.name: Admin Course Management
features.description: Admin users can create, edit, and delete courses, add and update sections (with YouTube URL validation), and manage resources.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Log in -> Redirect to /admin

Navigate to /admin/courses -> Navigate to /admin/courses/new -> Fill course title and other required fields -> Add a section with a valid YouTube URL -> Submit new course -> See the new course listed on /admin/courses
Navigate to /admin/courses -> Select a course from the list -> Open edit screen -> Update course fields and section details with a valid YouTube URL -> Save changes -> See updated course in list
Navigate to /admin/courses -> Select a course from the list -> Delete the course -> See the course removed from the list
Navigate to /admin/courses/new -> Leave title empty or supply an invalid YouTube URL for a section -> Submit -> See validation error for empty title or invalid YouTube URL

features.name: Admin Comment Moderation
features.description: Admin users can view student comments, post replies, and delete inappropriate comments.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Log in -> Redirect to /admin
Navigate to /admin/comments -> View list of student comments -> Type admin reply for a comment -> Click Save reply -> See admin reply associated with the comment
Navigate to /admin/comments -> Select a comment -> Delete the comment -> See the comment removed from the moderation list

routes.description: Redirects users to admin dashboard, student dashboard, or public course catalog based on session.
Login page for students and admin.
Protected student dashboard with available courses and student comment count.
Public course detail page with sections, embedded YouTube video, resources, and comments.
Protected admin course edit screen for course fields, sections, and resources.
Protected admin comment moderation and reply screen.

features.name: Student Registration
features.description: A new student can create an account and is signed in automatically.
user_interactions: See validation error for missing or invalid fields
Redirect to student dashboard on success

features.name: Login and Logout
features.description: Students and admin can log in, receive an HTTP-only session cookie, and log out.
user_interactions: See validation error for missing or invalid fields
Redirect to role-specific dashboard on success

features.name: Public Course Browsing
features.description: Visitors can list courses and open course detail pages without logging in.
user_interactions: View sections and embedded lesson video
Click section buttons to switch video

features.name: Student Commenting
features.description: Logged-in students can add comments to a course section and see admin replies.
user_interactions: See validation error for empty comment
See the new comment in the discussion

features.name: Admin Course Management
features.description: Admin can create, edit, and delete courses, sections, and resources.
user_interactions: Add or edit video sections with valid YouTube URLs
See validation error for empty title or invalid YouTube URL

features.name: Admin Comment Moderation
features.description: Admin can view student comments, reply to them, and delete inappropriate comments.

known_limitations.issue: Local SQLite file is suitable for local demos but not persistent on Vercel serverless deployments.
known_limitations.impact: Production deployment should use a hosted SQLite-compatible database such as Turso/libSQL.

known_limitations.issue: Browser automation visual verification may depend on external YouTube iframe availability.
known_limitations.impact: Tests should verify iframe src and fallback UI rather than relying on playable third-party media.
